title: she_verify_mac returns bool instead of Err for invalid MAC
description: she_verify_mac returns Result<bool> where false means MAC invalid. All other verification functions in the crate (ecc verify_digest, ed25519 verify, mldsa verify) return Err(WolfHsmError::Ffi) for an invalid signature/MAC. A caller using the ? operator on she_verify_mac will silently pass even when the MAC is wrong, because false is an Ok value. Maintenance consequence: inconsistency means every new caller must remember the special bool contract; code review must catch the pattern each time.
